debug_info.goal:
k : ℕ
n m : CartSpᵒᵖ

ω : DSmoothMap (Eucl (Opposite.unop n)) (Eucl (Opposite.unop n) [⋀^Fin k]→ₗ[ℝ] ℝ)
this : ContDiff ℝ (↑⊤) (fderiv ℝ f.unop.toFun)
⊢ DSmooth fun x => (ω (f.unop x)).compLinearMap ↑(fderiv ℝ (⇑f.unop) x)

failed_attempts:

        refine ContinuousMultilinearMap.contDiff_eval.comp (contDiff_fst.prod <| ContDiff.pi fun i ↦ ?_)
        exact ContDiff.clm_apply.comp contDiff_snd contDiff_const

        exact AlternatingMap.contDiff_compLinearMap

        · exact ω.dsmooth.contDiff.comp f.unop.dsmooth.contDiff
        · cont_diff; exact this

        rfl

        apply ContDiff.contDiff_of_differentiable
        intro x; apply DifferentiableAt.compLinearMap; exact differentiableAt_id
fun _ _ ↦ by apply Sheaf.Hom.ext; ext; rfl

        · exact ω.dsmooth.contDiff.comp f.unop.dsmooth.contDiff
        · refine ContDiff.pi.2 fun i ↦ ?_
          exact (ContinuousLinearMap.apply_contDiff (v i)).comp this

apply ContDiff.dsmooth

rw [dsmooth_iff_contDiff]
